title: BlotterConfig
description: Defines column layout, field visibility, and masking rules for the ag-Grid list view. Optimised for rendering many items efficiently. Contains no knowledge of the WorkItem data model — references WorkItem.fields by dot-notation path only, resolved by FieldPathResolver at runtime. Data classification is authoritative in field-type-registry only — this config cannot override classification (security constraint).

workflowType.description: Links this config to WorkItems of this type.

columns.description: Ordered array of column definitions. Column order determines display order in the blotter.

field.description: Dot-notation path into WorkItem.fields (e.g. trade.ref, counterparty.name) or a top-level WorkItem property (e.g. status, priorityLevel, assignedGroup). Resolved by FieldPathResolver. For filter operations, the path must be declared searchable:true in field-type-registry — validateConfigs enforces this.

header.description: Display label shown in the column header.

visible.description: Default column visibility. Users can toggle visibility in the blotter.

sortable.description: Whether the column can be sorted. Requires a PostgreSQL index on this field path.

filterable.description: Whether the column can be filtered. Requires searchable:true in field-type-registry — validateConfigs enforces this.

maskingRoles.description: Roles that see this field unmasked. Users with other roles see *** instead. Masking applied based on field-type-registry.dataClassification — this list refines which roles bypass masking for this column in context.

formatter.description: Display format override for this column. If absent, defaults to the formatter declared in field-type-registry for this path.

defaultSort.description: Default sort applied when the blotter loads.

field.description: Dot-notation path. Must match a field in the columns array.

quickFilters.description: Preset filter combinations surfaced as one-click buttons in the blotter toolbar (e.g. My Items, CRITICAL Priority, Overdue).
